name: WM-Pickems
description: WM Tips – World Cup 2026 prediction game. Predict tournament outcomes, tip individual matches, and compete on private leaderboards with friends and colleagues.

paths.name: App Data
paths.description: PocketBase database, uploaded files, and application state.

ports.name: WebUI
ports.description: Web interface for the WM Tips prediction game.

variables.name: HTTP Port
variables.description: Host port the server listens on.

variables.name: API Football Key
variables.description: API-Football key for live results (paid plan only). Leave empty to use free openfootball community data.

variables.name: Results Source
variables.description: Results source: auto (default), apifootball, or openfootball.

variables.name: Admin Email
variables.description: PocketBase superuser email (created on first boot if set).

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: PocketBase superuser password (created on first boot if set).

variables.name: Google Client ID
variables.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Client ID for sign-in. Leave empty to disable Google login.

variables.name: Google Client Secret
variables.description: Google OAuth 2.0 Client Secret. Leave empty to disable Google login.
